comment.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://rutube.ru/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Frutube.ru%2F) ### Comment > https://rutube.ru- На этом сайте, каждые 2 минуты в видео показывают рекламу даже на детских каналах, реклама со звуком на всю громкость! Претензия для администрации сайта оказалась неважной. Невозможно смотреть видео до конца, приходится закрывать вкладку когда начинает орать реклама. Пожалуйста, заблокируйте рекламу в видеороликах ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/p8e0kz6d8lcw4wk84sg0k8sgkwkocs4lb8b9v5gsxs.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.46 MV3 System version: | `Windows 10` Browser: | Yandex Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter Filters last update: | 2026-04-20T21:00:42 Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (2880h)

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.info/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.46&system_version=Windows+10&manifest_version=3&browser=other&browser_detail=Yandex&filters=2.3.18.19.20.21.22&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&filters_last_update=2026-04-20T21%3A00%3A42)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

performed_via_github_app.name: GitHub Actions
performed_via_github_app.description: Automate your workflow from idea to production

comment.body:
Both rules are required. Please review the investigation results below and approve them. - The `.hepsiads-voltran-body` rule is necessary for both desktop and mobile. It was added in commit #219101.
Screenshot (Disabled TurkishFilter state)
- The `#DESKTOP_MASTHEAD-googleAdvertisement` rule added at https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/132406#issuecomment-1280742250 still appears on desktop.
Screenshot (Enabled TurkishFilter)
--- By the way, I discovered these initial rule commits using `git log --oneline -S - `. I will use this method to continue searching when a certain rule is added and where it appears, not by guessing or spending more time.
